[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00010100 2
7 01010101 4

01 01110101 5
12 11111111 a
23 11001010 4
34 11110111 7
45 10111111 7
56 01110011 5
67 11001111 6
70 10111110 6

35 11111111 a

71 00110101 4

03 01011101 5

72 00110101 4

04 01010101 4 match 7

37 11111111 a

73 00111100 4
